description_long: This object is a medieval-style sword featuring a long, straight, double-edged blade with a pointed tip, ideal for thrusting and slashing. The blade is metallic and has a uniform, silvery-gray coloration, suggesting it is made of steel. The hilt includes a prominent crossguard with ornate, curled quillons and a central red gem or pommel, adding a decorative and functional element to the design. The grip is cylindrical, dark in color, and appears to be wrapped or textured for improved handling. The sword's overall proportions and detailing indicate it is designed for both display and practical use. The combination of metallic and ornamental features makes it visually striking and suitable for ceremonial or combat scenarios.
description: A medieval-style sword with a straight, double-edged steel blade, ornate crossguard, and a red gem pommel. The handle is dark and textured for grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, ornate crossguard, and red gem pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the blade, crossguard, and pommel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, dark, textured or wrapped, with a rounded pommel
attribute_ornamentation: red gem in pommel, ornate crossguard
